Luxury Resort
The Event

An Unforgettable Week
in Los Cabos

The World Couples Golf Classic returns for its third year, bringing together couples who love golf and luxury travel in equal measure. Set against the dramatic clifftop backdrop of the Nicklaus-designed Quivira Golf Club — widely regarded as one of the finest courses in Latin America — this six-night, all-inclusive event is as much about connection as competition.

Hosted by PGA of America Professional Dan O'Shaughnessy, every detail of the competitive programme and resort experience has been curated to ensure couples of all handicap levels feel at home, challenged, and rewarded.

Schedule

Six Days,
Perfectly Planned

54 holes of competitive couples golf across three rounds at Quivira, bracketed by a welcome reception and a closing prize gala on the Pacific. Every morning has purpose. Every evening is yours.

Day 1 · Jan 30
Arrival & Welcome
Private airport transfers to Pueblo Bonito Pacifica. Check-in, welcome cocktails, and a casual orientation evening with your hosts Dan O'Shaughnessy and Rose Rismanchi.
Day 2 · Jan 31
Round One — Quivira
Tee times 08:00–10:45. 18 competitive holes at the Nicklaus-designed Quivira Golf Club. Green fee, practice balls, and full driving range access included. On-course comfort stations at holes 4–5, 8–9, and 16 with food and open bar throughout.
Day 3 · Feb 1
Optional Whale Watching
Your free day on the Pacific. Join an optional whale watching tour — Los Cabos is one of the world's premier migration corridors. Alternatively, enjoy the private beach, spa, pool, or a practice round at Quivira.
Day 4 · Feb 2
Round Two — Quivira
Tee times 08:15–11:00. 18 more competitive holes with updated leaderboard reveal. Green fee, practice balls, and full driving range access included. On-course comfort stations throughout.
Day 5 · Feb 3
Final Round — Quivira
Tee times 08:00–11:15. The decisive 18 holes at Quivira. Dramatic clifftop finishing holes with the Pacific as your backdrop. Green fee, practice balls, and full driving range access included. Leaderboard confirmed. Champions crowned.
Day 6 · Feb 4–5
Gala Dinner & Departure
Closing gala dinner from 6:00pm — prize giving, awards ceremony, and a celebration on the beach. Departure transfers on Feb 5. Safe travels, and we'll see you next year.
Rismanchi Golf Group

What's Included

Everything Taken
Care Of

Your package is fully all-inclusive. From the moment your transfer picks you up at the airport to the moment you depart, the only thing you need to bring is your game.

6-Night All-Inclusive Stay
Luxury accommodation at Pueblo Bonito Pacifica in your chosen room category, fully all-inclusive throughout.
54-Hole Couples Tournament
Three competitive rounds at Quivira Golf Club including caddies, scoring, prizes, and a gala closing ceremony.
Gourmet Dining & Premium Drinks
21 restaurants (4 on-site), premium spirits, wines, and local beers — unlimited and all-inclusive throughout your stay.
Private Beach & Resort Access
Adults-only 5-star resort with private Pacific Ocean beach access, pool, spa, and watersports throughout your stay.
Return Airport Transfers
Private return transfers from Los Cabos International Airport to the resort on arrival and departure days.
Host Pro — Dan O'Shaughnessy
Exclusive access to your PGA of America Professional host throughout the week — clinics, tips, and tournament direction included.
Your Hosts

Dan
O'Shaughnessy

Head Golf Professional

Quarter Century PGA Certified member in player development. Dedicated to helping golfers become better, developing short and long term plans to improving skills and knowledge all the while, emphasizing the fun, social and rewarding aspects the game of golf offers.

PGA of America Certified Professional
Founder, World Couples Golf Classic (3 editions)
25+ Years PGA Member — Player Development
Tournament Director, Quivira Classic Series
 

Rose
Rismanchi

Rose Rismanchi brings warmth, energy, and a passion for the game to every event she hosts. A natural connector and experienced tournament organiser, Rose ensures every couple feels at home from the moment they arrive in Los Cabos.

Rose is the social heartbeat of the World Couples Golf Classic — coordinating welcome events, off-course activities, and the all-important closing gala. Her attention to detail and genuine enthusiasm for the couples golf experience makes her an indispensable part of the week.

Co-Host, World Couples Golf Classic
Tournament & Events Coordinator
